children.name: Kyopoda
children.description: Kyopoda — a genus of kyopodiid stalked jellyfish in the family Kyopodiidae.

children.name: Kyopoda lamberti
children.description: Kyopoda is a genus of stalked jellyfish, It has only one species in the genus, Kyopoda lamberti, and is in turn the only genus in the family Kyopodiidiae..
